category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a logic/functional programming language; official Mercury documentation and GitHub repository describe the Mercury logic programming system.
display_name_sources: Official Mercury website and GitHub repository use “Mercury”; source_facts.name is mercury.
docs_sources: Official Mercury documentation page links manuals including the user guide and language reference manual.
repo_sources: Official Mercury GitHub repository is identified as the Mercury logic programming system and linked from project materials; source_facts.repo is empty.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies logic/functional programming language; official docs cover language syntax and implementation; source_facts.executables lists compiler and toolchain commands.
